TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Pinsbkan, title = Pinsbkan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pinsbkan} }

S.FORM: Pinsbkan Pinsbkan ga, kinhulan ta' ita' Tayal. minpsgagay kya Pinsbkan qu binkisan ta ita' Tayal hiya ma. ywaw kinhulan ita Tayal, minnaki ta squ qalang na Stbwan, nyux mha sqaniy minniru mha: minnaki ta rhiyal m'ma na Stbwan, Pinsbkan son nha smi lalu, puqing ke na Tayal ga,"bnka btunux", wiwan nqu rhiyal na utux bnkis. Sraral ga, maki sqaniy qutux hupa balay na btunux, si tbah mcka qutux ryax, kahul ska na btunux, mhtuw qutux mlikuy ru qutux kneril, nanu hga puqing 'ringan balay bnkis ta. Sazing hga qaniy msqun ru mbhuyaw m'laqi, smbil maki squ rgyax ga, llaqi na Tayal, taqu mbiyaq mwah te hugal ga, llaqi na binah Tayal. Kyalaw simu loziy sazing na ywaw pinqywan, nyux mha sqaniy minniru nya: rgyax na Papak Waqa cyux maki squ te htgan wagi na qalang S'uraw qmapah squ llyung na Mknazi. Maki squ sinbilan ke mha: obeh tehuk b'bu na rgyax Papak waqa, cyux mhtuw kya qutux btunux, cyux tlqing kya qutux mlikuy ru qutux kneril, nanu qu cyaqung ki siliq, qutux qutux ryax mwah pzimu sqaniy aki mhtuw squliq qaniy. Maki qutux ryax, mhtuw balay squliq la, mhtuw qutux mlikuy ru qutux kneril, msqun sazing hga, mbhuyaw m'laqi, tehuk soni kya pira kbhul kawas wayal, nanu qaniy qu kwara llaqi Tayal na sinbilan. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' йҷіе’Ңе№і,HetayвҖ§Hayung

Pinsbkan Pinsbkan ga, kinhulan ta' ita' Tayal. minpsgagay kya Pinsbkan qu binkisan ta ita' Tayal hiya ma. ywaw kinhulan ita Tayal, minnaki ta squ qalang na Stbwan, nyux mha sqaniy minniru mha: minnaki ta rhiyal m'ma na Stbwan, Pinsbkan son nha smi lalu, puqing ke na Tayal ga,"bnka btunux", wiwan nqu rhiyal na utux bnkis. Sraral ga, maki sqaniy qutux hupa balay na btunux, si tbah mcka qutux ryax, kahul ska na btunux, mhtuw qutux mlikuy ru qutux kneril, nanu hga puqing 'ringan balay bnkis ta. Sazing hga qaniy msqun ru mbhuyaw m'laqi, smbil maki squ rgyax ga, llaqi na Tayal, taqu mbiyaq mwah te hugal ga, llaqi na binah Tayal. Kyalaw simu loziy sazing na ywaw pinqywan, nyux mha sqaniy minniru nya: rgyax na Papak Waqa cyux maki squ te htgan wagi na qalang S'uraw qmapah squ llyung na Mknazi. Maki squ sinbilan ke mha: obeh tehuk b'bu na rgyax Papak waqa, cyux mhtuw kya qutux btunux, cyux tlqing kya qutux mlikuy ru qutux kneril, nanu qu cyaqung ki siliq, qutux qutux ryax mwah pzimu sqaniy aki mhtuw squliq qaniy. Maki qutux ryax, mhtuw balay squliq la, mhtuw qutux mlikuy ru qutux kneril, msqun sazing hga, mbhuyaw m'laqi, tehuk soni kya pira kbhul kawas wayal, nanu qaniy qu kwara llaqi Tayal na sinbilan. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' йҷіе’Ңе№і,HetayвҖ§Hayung
S.PHON: pins~Й•ОІkan pins~Й•ОІkan ЙЈa, kinД§ulan taК” itaК” tajal. minps~Й•ЙЈaЙЈaj kja pins~Й•ОІkan qu ОІinkis~Й•an ta itaК” tajal Д§ija ma. jwaw kinД§ulan ita tajal, minnaki ta s~Й•qu qalaЕӢ na s~Й•tОІwan, njux mД§a s~Й•qanij minniru mД§a: minnaki ta rД§ijal mК”ma na s~Й•tОІwan, pins~Й•ОІkan s~Й•on nД§a s~Й•mi lalu, puqiЕӢ ke na tajal ЙЈa,"ОІnka ОІtunux", wiwan nqu rД§ijal na utux ОІnkis~Й•. s~Й•raral ЙЈa, maki s~Й•qanij qutux Д§upa ОІalaj na ОІtunux, s~Й•i tОІaД§ mКҰ~КЁka qutux rjax, kaД§ul s~Й•ka na ОІtunux, mД§tuw qutux mlikuj ru qutux kneril, nanu Д§ЙЈa puqiЕӢ К”riЕӢan ОІalaj ОІnkis~Й• ta. s~Й•aziЕӢ Д§ЙЈa qanij ms~Й•qun ru mОІД§ujaw mК”laqi, s~Й•mОІil maki s~Й•qu rЙЈjax ЙЈa, llaqi na tajal, taqu mОІijaq mwaД§ te Д§uЙЈal ЙЈa, llaqi na ОІinaД§ tajal. kjalaw s~Й•imu lozij s~Й•aziЕӢ na jwaw pinqjwan, njux mД§a s~Й•qanij minniru nja: rЙЈjax na papak waqa КҰ~КЁjux maki s~Й•qu te Д§tЙЈan waЙЈi na qalaЕӢ s~Й•К”uraw qmapaД§ s~Й•qu lljuЕӢ na mknazi. maki s~Й•qu s~Й•inОІilan ke mД§a: oОІeД§ teД§uk ОІК”ОІu na rЙЈjax papak waqa, КҰ~КЁjux mД§tuw kja qutux ОІtunux, КҰ~КЁjux tlqiЕӢ kja qutux mlikuj ru qutux kneril, nanu qu КҰ~КЁjaquЕӢ ki s~Й•iliq, qutux qutux rjax mwaД§ pzimu s~Й•qanij aki mД§tuw s~Й•quliq qanij. maki qutux rjax, mД§tuw ОІalaj s~Й•quliq la, mД§tuw qutux mlikuj ru qutux kneril, ms~Й•qun s~Й•aziЕӢ Д§ЙЈa, mОІД§ujaw mК”laqi, teД§uk s~Й•oni kja pira kОІД§ul kawas~Й• wajal, nanu qanij qu kwara llaqi tajal na s~Й•inОІilan. КҰ~КЁinkД§ulan s~Й•a knitaК” s~Й•a ОІrОІiruК” ***,Д§etaj*Д§ajuЕӢ
